module.name: MA-cross strategy
module.title: Moving Average Cross Strategy
module.rationale: Produces order intent from moving-average crossovers.

observables.name: Session open
observables.description: Whether the trading session is currently open.

observables.name: Position quantity
observables.description: Net units held in the instrument; 0 means flat.

observables.name: Gross exposure
observables.description: Total absolute market exposure across all open positions.

observables.name: Strategy enabled
observables.description: Whether this strategy is allowed to trade.

observables.name: Max order notional
observables.description: Configured cap on the notional value of a single order.

observables.name: Max gross exposure
observables.description: Configured cap on total gross exposure.

events.name: Bar closed
events.description: A market-data bar has closed, carrying its close price and fast/slow moving averages.

events.name: Order requested
events.description: An order the strategy asks the broker to place.

behaviors.name: Open long
behaviors.title: Open long after bullish MA crossover
behaviors.rationale: When the market is open and we hold no position, and the fast moving average has just crossed above the slow one at this bar's close, place a BUY order.

behaviors.name: Close long
behaviors.title: Close long after bearish MA crossover
behaviors.rationale: When we hold a long position and the fast moving average has just crossed below the slow one at this bar's close, place a SELL order to exit.

invariants.name: Exposure within limit
invariants.title: Gross exposure stays within the configured limit
invariants.rationale: Whenever the strategy is enabled, total gross exposure must never exceed the configured maximum.

flows.name: Trade cycle
flows.title: Trading decision cycle
flows.rationale: The end-to-end decision sequence per bar: first consider opening a long, then consider closing it.
